items.caption_text:
Makeup inspired by the spider family in Demon Slayer!!! I would be lying if I said that my bruises from cupping wasn’t the catalyst to trying out this makeup — let me know if you would like to try any other makeup cosplay, this was a lot of fun 💕 
#demonslayercosplay #experimentalmakeup #avantgardemakeup

items.caption_text:
₍₍⚞(˶>ᗜ<˶)⚟⁾⁾ ROTTEN IS COMING BACK BABY 
📍 NEW YORK CITY - @blendbunnycosmetics is coming to @themakeupshow May 3-4, 2026 in booth C7!
-  Rotten and Efflorescence palette will be there along with MEeeEeeEeEeEEEe so please come and say hi and we can make up a secret handshake or something 
- On Sunday, May 3 from 1:30PM – 2:15PM – Same Industry, Different Lanes with myself and @jordanliberty
- Stay tuned on when the palette will be restocked online, will keep you updated! ٩(ˊᗜˋ*)و ♡ #avantgardemakeup #editorialmakeup #experimentalmakeup

items.caption_text:
Went to the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum and immediately turned art into makeup. @guggenheim 

Inspired by Gabriele Münter — I recreated the following:
Gabriele Münter: “Portrait of Anna Roslund,” 1917. Reproduced courtesy of Leicester Museums and Galleries and “Portrait of a Young Boy,” 1908. The Gabriele Münter and Johannes Eichner Foundation, Munich. © 2026 Artists Rights Society (ARS), New York / VG Bild-Kunst, Bonn.

Gabriele Münter, “Portrait of a Young Boy” 1908. The Gabriele Münter and Johannes Eichner Foundation, Munich. © 2026 Artists Rights Society (ARS), New York / VG Bild-Kunst, Bonn.

It’s the last week to see the exhibition! I highly recommend for you all to see it in real life. 
#guggenheim #avantgardemakeup #creativemakeup

items.caption_text:
This makeup look almost broke me, what’s your favourite? — I did three iterations of this Katsushika Hokusai’s(1760-1849), woodblock print, “Kirifuri Fall on Kurokami Mount”(19th century). I like individual aspects of each, if only my brain could have the foresight to merge them together 😆 thank you all for your suggestions and critique, it really helped me in my process 💕 
#avantgardemakeup #creativemakeup #illusionmakeup

items.caption_text:
I love an excuse to dress up, even if I’m just at home. This look is inspired by FKA Twigs, so I leaned into something soft, sculptural, and a little otherworldly. I’m staying in for @Coachella this year, but I’ll be watching it all live on @YouTube. I’ll see you there virtually! <3 #sponsored by YouTube 

#coachella2026 #livestream #grwm #avantgardemakeup

items.caption_text:
I dunked my face in water to test my makeup. 
Urban Decay All Nighter Setting Spray locked everything in place.
Not a single thing transferred. 

@urbandecaycosmetics #makeuptest  #urbandecay_partner #avantgardemakeup #allnighter

items.caption_text:
Peter Philips, I was unfamiliar with your game 🫡 We learned all about skin for @diorbeauty but I wanted to deep dive into @peterphilipsmakeup archive. I love his use of geometric shapes and graphic lines. I wanted to use the shapes of a jumping off point and then add my own personal style! 
•
@diorbeauty skinwear foundation in 0CR and lip oil 
#avantgardemakeup #editorialmakeup #creativemakeup #diorbeauty #diorforever

items.caption_text:
Photoshop IRL PT1: Chromatic Aberration ! This was the most requested look out of all the photoshop effects that I suggested. My plan is to make this a series as not only is it challenging, but it’ll be interesting to see how my painting stacks up against the technical effect! 
#avantgardemakeup #creativemakeup #experimentalmakeup

raw.caption:
Photoshop IRL PT1: Chromatic Aberration ! This was the most requested look out of all the photoshop effects that I suggested. My plan is to make this a series as not only is it challenging, but it’ll be interesting to see how my painting stacks up against the technical effect! 
#avantgardemakeup #creativemakeup #experimentalmakeup

items.caption_text:
Oh my, was a time had in Tokyo with @netflix @netflixca for their launch of @onepiecenetflix Season 2! As someone who is considered a retired anime watcher, this reignited my love for the genre and I can’t wait to dive back in. 💕 
#onepieces2 #avantgardemakeup #tokyo2026

items.caption_text:
My hands are my career!!!!! 
From getting my nails done to blending pigments to skincare prep — they do everything. 💕 
I’ve been keeping them soft with @loccitane Shea Butter Hand Cream so they can keep up. The formula is rich but sinks in fast… no greasy brush handles over here. #LOccitanePartner

raw.caption:
My hands are my career!!!!! 
From getting my nails done to blending pigments to skincare prep — they do everything. 💕 
I’ve been keeping them soft with @loccitane Shea Butter Hand Cream so they can keep up. The formula is rich but sinks in fast… no greasy brush handles over here. #LOccitanePartner

items.caption_text:

items.caption_text:
Red envelope, but editorial 🧧✨
Handmade in Kumano, Japan by master artisans — where less than 1% of the world’s brushes are made — @rephr.to makes even my most intricate looks feel easy. #RephrPartner #creativemakeup #lunarnewyear
